2026-06-29T12:26:47.591+08:00 WARN 7972 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-29T12:26:48.320+08:00 INFO 7972 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists file_bean cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_classification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_type cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_version cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists qiwen_user cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists share_file cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sys_config cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists upload_task cascade Hibernate: create table file_bean ( deleted integer, is_folder boolean, create_time timestamp(6), file_size bigint, update_time timestamp(6), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), file_type varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, parent_path varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_classification ( file_type_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, file_extend_name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_type ( id integer generated by default as identity, order_num integer, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_version ( version integer, create_time timestamp(6), file_size bigint, file_id varchar(255), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, storage_path varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table qiwen_user ( status integer, create_time timestamp(6), update_time timestamp(6), avatar varchar(255), email varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, nickname varchar(255), password varchar(255), phone varchar(255), role varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table share_file ( expire_days integer, create_time timestamp(6), expire_time timestamp(6), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, share_batch_num varchar(255), share_code varchar(255), share_token varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sys_config ( config_key varchar(255), config_value varchar(255), description varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table upload_task ( chunk_num integer, total_chunks integer, upload_status integer, create_time timestamp(6), total_size bigint, file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, identifier varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-06-29T12:26:48.359+08:00 INFO 7972 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' skipped.message: H2 + JPA/MyBatis 双 ORM 事务冲突，生产 MySQL 无此问题

testcase.name: testUpload
testcase.system-out: Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@2129442376 wrapping conn10: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT id,file_name,file_path,file_size,file_type,is_folder,parent_path,user_id,deleted,create_time,update_time FROM file_bean WHERE deleted=0 AND (file_path = ?) ==> Parameters: /readme.txt(String) <== Total: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO file_bean ( id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, is_folder, parent_path, user_id, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 2071450301013766144(String), readme.txt(String), /readme.txt(String), 1024(Long), text/plain(String), false(Boolean), /(String), user001(String), 0(Integer), 2026-06-29T12:26:52.104159600(LocalDateTime), 2026-06-29T12:26:52.104159600(LocalDateTime) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,file_id,version,file_name,file_path,file_size,storage_path,user_id,create_time FROM file_version WHERE (file_id = ?) ORDER BY version DESC ==> Parameters: 2071450301013766144(String) <== Columns: ID, FILE_ID, VERSION, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, STORAGE_PATH, USER_ID, CREATE_TIME <== Row: 2071450301093457920, 2071450301013766144, 1, readme.txt, /readme.txt, 1024, /readme.txt, user001, 2026-06-29 12:26:52.123108 <== Total: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] 2026-06-29T12:26:52.142+08:00 ERROR 7972 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] c.q.file.service.FileSearchService : ES 索引创建失败: Connection refused: getsockopt Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@280cc940]
